title: Catherine Lansfield Dramatic Floral Double Oven Glove Grey KT/46659/W/DGLV/GY
features: Catherine Lansfield is renowned for style and quality - designed and developed in Great Britain.

Oversized Impressionist style blossoms and peonies dramatically sit over a soft ground oven gloves, use to protect against heat and burning up to 250 degrees in the regular domestic kitchen environment.
Made from 100% Cotton. Machine Washable at 30 Degrees.
One Size. Suitable for use with domestic ovens only.
Ethically sourced overseas and made to quality and human-ecological safety standards.
description: 2. Taking inspiration from still-life paintings, this design features; oversized Impressionist style blossoms and peonies dramatically placed over soft ground, with Japanese woodblock silhouettes creating a soft delicate layered design. This product should be used to protect against heat and burning to the hands up to 250 degrees within a regular domestic kitchen environment.
